executive_summary: The website currently re-fetches images on every navigation and lightbox open, wasting bandwidth and causing slow perceived performance. This project implements a multi-layer caching strategy: client-side in-memory image cache, optimized Sanity image URLs with explicit dimensions, blur-up placeholders, and smart preloading. The goal is that once an image is loaded, it is never re-fetched from the network.
problems_identified: No client-side image caching — images re-fetch on every component mount
urlFor().url() called without width/quality transforms — full-resolution assets sent
No blur-up placeholders — images pop in abruptly with no skeleton
Missing sizes prop on OfficerCard — Next.js defaults to 1080px srcset
Overuse of priority prop (10 components) — defeats lazy loading, wastes bandwidth
PersonLightbox re-mounts on every open — no image preloading
Awards Lightbox re-fetches all images on open — no caching
No Service Worker or Cache API usage for images

architecture_strategy.layer_1_browser_cache: Leverage Sanity CDN Cache-Control headers (already set to immutable). Add explicit width/quality params to reduce payload size.
architecture_strategy.layer_2_next_image: Fix sizes props, reduce priority usage, add blur placeholders via blurDataURL.
architecture_strategy.layer_3_client_cache: Create an in-memory LRU image cache (Map-based) that stores preloaded Image objects. Lightbox components check cache before fetching.
architecture_strategy.layer_4_preloading: Preload above-the-fold images on page load. Preload lightbox images when parent card is hovered.
architecture_strategy.layer_5_url_optimization: Add .width(), .quality(), .format() calls to all urlFor() usages to get optimized CDN URLs.

functional_requirements: FR1: All Sanity image URLs must include explicit width and quality parameters
FR2: OfficerCard must include a sizes prop matching its rendered width
FR3: priority prop must only be used on truly above-the-fold images (hero, first carousel item)
FR4: PersonLightbox must preload the current + adjacent images when opened
FR5: Awards Lightbox must cache loaded images in memory to prevent re-fetch on close/reopen
FR6: A reusable useImagePreloader hook must be created for preloading images on hover
FR7: A reusable ImageWithFallback component must handle loading states and blur placeholders
FR8: blurDataURL must be generated for all Sanity images (use blurred placeholder or LQIP)

execution_milestones.name: URL Optimization — Fix Sanity Image URLs
tasks: Create lib/imageUrl.js — helper that wraps urlFor() with default width/quality/format
Update all GROQ queries to include metadatadimensions for blurDataURL generation
Replace raw urlFor(source).url() calls with optimized urlFor(source).width(w).quality(q).url()
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): create optimized image URL helper with width/quality transforms

execution_milestones.name: Fix sizes Props — Match Rendered Widths
tasks: Add sizes prop to OfficerCard (w-[25rem] = 400px)
Audit and fix all sizes props across components
Ensure each component's sizes matches its actual rendered width
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): add correct sizes props to all image components

execution_milestones.name: Fix Priority Prop — Reduce Overuse
tasks: Audit all priority={true} usages
Remove priority from below-the-fold images (AwardCard, BlogCard, ArticleCard, etc.)
Keep priority only on HeroCarousel first item, PersonLightbox, and Awards Lightbox main image
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): reduce priority prop overuse — only above-the-fold

execution_milestones.name: Blur Placeholder Utility
tasks: Create lib/imagePlaceholders.js — generates a 20px wide blurred LQIP URL from Sanity image
Create a getBlurDataURL(source) helper that returns a tiny blurred version
Export for use by all image components
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(images): create LQIP blur placeholder utility for Sanity images

execution_milestones.name: ImageWithFallback Component
tasks: Create components/ui/ImageWithFallback.js — wraps next/image with loading state, blur placeholder, and error fallback
Show skeleton/pulse animation while loading
Show fallback image on error
Accept blurDataURL prop
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(images): create ImageWithFallback component with loading skeleton

execution_milestones.name: useImagePreloader Hook
tasks: Create hooks/useImagePreloader.js — preloads images into browser cache
Accept an array of image URLs
Create Image() objects and call .src = url to trigger browser preload
Return loading state per image
Supports preload-on-hover pattern
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(images): create useImagePreloader hook for hover-based preloading

execution_milestones.name: In-Memory Image Cache (LRU)
tasks: Create lib/imageCache.js — Map-based LRU cache with 50-image limit
Store Image objects keyed by URL
Auto-evict oldest entries when limit reached
Export get(url), set(url, img), has(url) methods
Used by lightbox components to avoid re-fetching
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(images): create LRU image cache for lightbox components

execution_milestones.name: PersonLightbox — Add Preloading + Cache
tasks: Preload current + next/prev images when lightbox opens
Use imageCache to store loaded images
Show blur placeholder while main image loads
Preload adjacent images in background
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): add preloading and caching to PersonLightbox

execution_milestones.name: Awards Lightbox — Add Preloading + Cache
tasks: Preload all award images when lightbox opens
Cache loaded images in imageCache
Show blur placeholder while main image loads
Preload thumbnail strip images
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): add preloading and caching to Awards Lightbox

execution_milestones.name: Card Hover Preloading
tasks: Add onMouseEnter handler to BlogCard, ArticleCard, ThesisCard, GalleryCard
On hover, preload the linked page's header image
Use useImagePreloader hook
No visible change — just faster navigation
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(images): preload page images on card hover for instant navigation

execution_milestones.name: HeroCarousel — Preload Adjacent Slides
tasks: Preload next + previous hero images in background
Use useEffect to preload when currentIndex changes
Ensure smooth transitions between slides
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): preload adjacent hero carousel slides

execution_milestones.name: Next.js Image Config Optimization
tasks: Add formats: ['image/avif', 'image/webp'] to next.config.mjs images config
Add deviceSizes and imageSizes for better srcset generation
Consider adding minimumCacheTTL for image optimization cache
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(images): optimize Next.js image config for AVIF/WebP formats

execution_milestones.name: AGENTS.md Documentation Update
tasks: Document the image caching architecture in AGENTS.md
Add image optimization guidelines for new components
Document the useImagePreloader hook usage
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(images): document image caching architecture and guidelines

execution_milestones.name: Final PRD Status Update
tasks: Mark all slices as completed in prd.json
Add commit history
Update status to Implemented
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(prd): mark all image caching slices as implemented

success_criteria.no_duplicate_fetches: Opening a lightbox twice does not re-fetch images from network
success_criteria.blur_placeholders: All images show a blurred placeholder while loading
success_criteria.correct_sizes: Every next/image has a sizes prop matching its rendered width
success_criteria.preload_on_hover: Card hover triggers background preload of linked page images
success_criteria.lru_cache: Lightbox images cached in memory, evicted after 50 images
